HERMÈS Lindy 30 Bleu Atoll (3P) Taurillon Clemence Leather

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Lindy 30
Material: Taurillon Clemence (TC) Leather
Color: Bleu Atoll (Color Code 3P) - A beautiful pastel 'Macaron Blue'
Blind Stamp: Stamp A
Dimensions: 30 x 19 x 16 cm (approx.)
Accessories Included: Original Dust Bag

Condition Report:
Condition: Pristine / Excellent (98% New)
This gorgeous Lindy 30 is in exceptional, barely-used condition, having been kept carefully in storage for most of its life. The exterior leather is pristine with absolutely no scuffs, rubbing, or signs of wear. The interior is immaculate and flawless, further indicating that the bag was hardly ever carried. A truly perfect piece for any Hermès collector. Please review all photos carefully to appreciate its flawless condition before placing your order.
